items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New arrival: 2020 IT BAG. A must-have that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features imported Italian fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps. It's simply too fun!
Model: 2020
Size: 19x13x5cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Hobo bag shoulder bag is here✔️
Typical ultra-cool minimalist style, minimalist lovers, come get it.
Minimalist cold style curved shape, overall design simple, lazy yet intellectual. Looks elegant and atmospheric when worn, very light weight. Cowhide texture is super fine! The unique curved design really hits the spot ؔʁ̷ l̲̮ ؔʁ̷✧
Simple and versatile shape, a must-have for K-pop and Japanese fashion influencers.
Go all the way with minimalism, adding a bit of playfulness to the cool style~
Model: 672615
Size: 24.5×18×7cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
▪️LE 5 À 7▪️
The hot-to-trot shoulder bag YSL finally has!!️ When I first saw it, I thought the name was so special. Inspired by the niche film "Cléo from 5 to 7", it tells the story of the 5-7 PM gap between leaving work and getting home, and how the protagonist Cléo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, looking structured yet not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives off a unique aura that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 657228
Size: 24.5x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Manhattan 24cm】
New in-store synchronized Manhattan Baguette Small 24cm! The latest bag style, a flap Manhattan bag, replaces the classic logo with a low-key, minimalist design style. It is a bit like a Hermès Kelly, full of retro vibes! Combining business and casual, it is versatile! Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, multi-functional, satisfying both business women and young girls! Carefully selected original factory leather, perfect stitching, exquisite hardware, exuding a high-end aura!
Model: 675626
Size: 24x17.5x6cm
